name: Nativex
description: Global mobile marketing platform from Mobvista for app user acquisition with integrated SDK and creative tools.

seo.title: Nativex — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Nativex: Global mobile marketing platform from Mobvista for app user acquisition with integrated SDK and creative tools.

when_to_use: Running app user acquisition campaigns in Chinese markets
Scaling mobile installs with integrated creative SDK
Retargeting lapsed users via programmatic DSP
A/B testing creatives with built-in performance analytics

cons: Chinese ownership raises Western compliance flags
Creative services better than self-serve tools
review.verdict: Solid UA partner for APAC scale, but enterprise Western brands will vet carefully.
review.best_for: Publishers expanding into China and emerging markets needing a local-savvy partner.
review.not_for: Western enterprises with strict China-related vendor review policies.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
